hidden_defects.condition: A copied or zipped implementation had no single local command proving all root launchers can build isolated runtime bundles without touching production runtime state.
hidden_defects.impact: Runtime implementation appeared weaker than contract/evidence artifacts because a reviewer could not reproduce safe boot behavior quickly.
hidden_defects.reproducibility: Reproduced by absence of a dedicated safe smoke entry point before this patch.
hidden_defects.affected_scope: UPBIT/BINANCE PAPER/LIVE launcher surfaces, temporary runtime artifact generation
hidden_defects.live_safety_impact: Positive: the new smoke command proves live paths remain blocked while launchers render runtime artifacts.
hidden_defects.ux_impact: Operator/reviewer now gets one PASS/FAIL report instead of inferring from scattered tests.
hidden_defects.profitability_impact: Indirect: faster reproducible runtime checks reduce false confidence before strategy and optimizer evidence work.
hidden_defects.fix: Added trader1.runtime.smoke, tools/run_safe_smoke.py, schema, registry mapping, and tests.

hidden_defects.condition: Initial smoke logic looked for a non-existent dashboard_display_truth_only field instead of the dashboard shell display_only/dashboard_truth_only/truth_role triplet.
hidden_defects.impact: A smoke report could fail to prove the dashboard remained display truth only even when the dashboard shell was safe.
hidden_defects.reproducibility: Observed during tools/run_safe_smoke.py --skip-validators before final patch adjustment.
hidden_defects.affected_scope: dashboard display truth vs execution truth validation
hidden_defects.live_safety_impact: Live stayed blocked; proof quality was improved.
hidden_defects.ux_impact: Prevents misleading or missing dashboard-truth confirmation in the smoke result.
hidden_defects.fix: Smoke check now validates display_only=true, dashboard_truth_only=true, and truth_role=dashboard_serving_truth.

hidden_defects.condition: New runtime reproducibility behavior needed schema, registry, requirement index, artifact matrix, and current state mapping to avoid another code/artifact mismatch.
hidden_defects.impact: Runtime implementation could be present but invisible to MVP-4 evidence tracking.
hidden_defects.reproducibility: Detected while reconciling the user score table against current implementation state.
hidden_defects.ux_impact: Operator/reporting can distinguish implemented smoke verification from unimplemented runtime trading.
hidden_defects.profitability_impact: None direct; improves build/package confidence before further strategy work.
hidden_defects.fix: Added safe smoke schema, registry entry, requirement mapping, context pack, evidence, and patch ledger entry.

advancement_gaps.current_level: safe boot and reproducibility smoke for root launchers
advancement_gaps.target_level: operational PAPER runtime cycle with verified ledger/equity/position updates and strategy candidate generation

advancement_gaps.current_level: single local safe smoke command plus unit test coverage
advancement_gaps.target_level: source bundle manifest plus one-command full safe test profile
PAPER data-backed strategy candidate reports and net-EV scorecards generated by runtime cycle
